workflow_name: Executive Meeting Transcript -> Manager Brief + Asks
user_message: Just came out of consumption trend with Quantum Analytics. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Quantum Analytics
Date: 2024-01-07
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on consumption trend from our last session.

[00:07:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:09:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:12:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for integration complexity is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:14:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:19:00] Robert Foster (Quantum Analytics): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is vendor dependencies.

handoffs.condition: business review narrative input from exec meeting

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF50-K trap (Risk register conflates tactical risks with strategic ones); produces complete Executive brief (strategic density), asks section (actionable for exec), risk register, skip-level f
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF50-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF50-K failure mode (Risk register conflates tactical risks with strategic ones)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF50-K -- Risk register conflates tactical risks with strategic ones
